ModifyTbspIpCleanThreshold.ip: Protected IP address of the DDoS enhanced protection package
ModifyTbspIpCleanThreshold.thresholdType: Cleaning threshold type for the protected IP: bandwidth cap (bandwidth), smart threshold (auto), or manual setting (manual)
ModifyTbspIpCleanThreshold.cleanMbps: Traffic bandwidth in Mbps, min 120 Mbps, max 10000 Mbps (required when thresholdType is manual)
ModifyTbspIpCleanThreshold.cleanPps: Packet rate in pps, min 58594 pps, max 4882813 pps (required when thresholdType is manual)
